_about: Machine-readable watchlist triggers compiled from each note's 'upgrade/re-examine triggers' (the human-readable truth stays in watchlist.md + research/<T>.md). Read by scripts/watch-triggers. Filing events come free from SEC EDGAR submissions; insider_buys means 'alert on any Form 4 reporting an open-market purchase (code P)'; price rules are valuation thresholds from the notes, checked with a screening-only price and NEVER a verdict by themselves - a fired trigger only means: run /recheck.

PLMR.why: quake GWP re-accel x2 qtrs; cat-tested CR <90%; casualty development; ~2x book; any insider buy

CASH.why: FY2026 10-K (Nov) must declare ICFR effective; 2 qtrs of NET INCOME growth; any insider buy

FI.why: Q2 2026 results (~early Aug): positive organic x2 qtrs, Clover merchants+revenue up together, margins troughing, S&P outlook

BA.why: FCF durably positive, MAX 7/10 certified, debt falling (research/BA.md)

BRBR.why: EBITDA/margins stabilize 2 qtrs, guidance stops being cut, leverage falls (research/BRBR.md)

price_rules.label: PEG toward ~1.0 needs a much lower price (research/CSV.md; recompute at recheck)

CSV.why: organic volume re-inflects, leverage to ~3.5x, 2029 notes refinanced on known terms

price_rules.label: fear-marked toward PEG~1 / ~14x adj EPS (research/BR.md; recompute at recheck)

BR.why: own when fear marks it down and/or bookings re-accelerate

RKLB.why: re-eval only if Neutron reaches orbit AND FCF turns positive (research/RKLB.md)
